name: claude-design-bridge
description: Read-only Codex bridge for fetching official Claude Design source through Claude Code DesignSync with verified snapshots and SHA-256 provenance.

scripts.check: node --check plugins/claude-design-bridge/server/design-validation.mjs && node --check plugins/claude-design-bridge/server/claude-delegate.mjs && node --check plugins/claude-design-bridge/server/design-source.mjs && node --check plugins/claude-design-bridge/server/design-bridge.mjs && node --check scripts/benchmark-design-reads.mjs
